command.text: declare @unit varchar(33) set @unit = @@unit select ma_so_thue as companyTaxCode, so_dt as phoneNumber, tk_nh as bankInfoInvoice, case when @@language = 'V' then ten_gd else ten_gd2 end as directorName, case when @@language = 'V' then ten_ktt else ten_ktt2 end as chiefAccountantName, case when @@language = 'V' then ten_thu_quy else ten_thu_quy2 end as cashierName, case when @@language = 'V' then ten_thu_kho else ten_thu_kho2 end as storeKeeperName from dmdvcskb where ma_dvcs = @unit and status = '1'
